rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the implementation scope when binding outputs to concrete values, and into the type scope only for visible port-level contracts.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL scope boundaries: type annexes reference only visible features; implementation annexes may bind subcomponent outputs.
Maintain type consistency in AGREE expressions using only int, real, or bool types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for all AGREE blocks.
Use `guarantee "label": expression;` for output range constraints on visible outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or implementation-only identifiers in component type annexes.
